# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: enable-envoy-admin-interface
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels: {}
  configPatches:
    - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
      match:
        listener:
          filterChain:
            filter:
              name: envoy.filters.network.http
      patch:
        operation: MERGE
        value:
          listenerFilters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http
              typedConfig:
                '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http.v3.HttpFilter
                name: envoy.admin
                config:
                  port: 15000
                  access_policy:
                    allow_credentials: true
                    allow_headers: '*'
                    allow_methods: '*'
                    allow_origins: '*'
                  merge_with: ""
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: expose-admin-endpoints
spec:
  host: '*'
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_CONN
    admin:
      access_methods:
        - GET
        - POST
      address: 127.0.0.1:15000
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-admin-traffic
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT_PERMISSIVE
  selector: {}
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-admin-headers
spec:
  selector: {}
  rules:
    - excludedPaths: []
      http:
        - methods: ["GET", "POST"]
          paths: ["/config_dump", "/stats", "/clusters"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-admin-traffic
spec:
  selector: {}
  rules:
    - actions:
        - ALLOW
      resources:
        - namespace: '*'
          paths: ["/config_dump", "/stats", "/clusters"]
---
apiVersion: admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1
kind: ValidatingWebhookConfiguration
metadata:
  name: istio-admission-webhook-configs
webhooks:
  - name: istio-admission-webhook-validate.istio-system.svc
    clientConfig:
      service:
        name: istio-admission-webhook
        namespace: istio-system
      caBundle: <base64-encoded-ca-certificate>
    rules:
      - operations: ["CREATE", "UPDATE"]
        apiGroups: ["apps", "extensions", "networking.istio.io", "security.istio.io"]
        apiVersions: ["v1", "v1beta1", "v1alpha3"]
        resources: ["deployments", "ingresses", "virtualservices", "destinationrules", "peerauthentications", "requestauthentications", "authorizationpolicies"]
    admissionReviewVersions: ["v1"]
    sideEffects: None
    failurePolicy: Fail
---
apiVersion: admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1
kind: MutatingWebhookConfiguration
metadata:
  name: istio-admission-webhook-configs
webhooks:
  - name: istio-admission-webhook-mutate.istio-system.svc
    clientConfig:
      service:
        name: istio-admission-webhook
        namespace: istio-system
      caBundle: <base64-encoded-ca-certificate>
    rules:
      - operations: ["CREATE", "UPDATE"]
        apiGroups: ["apps", "extensions", "networking.istio.io", "security.istio.io"]
        apiVersions: ["v1", "v1beta1", "v1alpha3"]
        resources: ["deployments", "ingresses", "virtualservices", "destinationrules", "peerauthentications", "requestauthentications", "authorizationpolicies"]
    admissionReviewVersions: ["v1"]
    sideEffects: None
    failurePolicy: Fail
